headline: Assessing Electronic Arts (EA) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Price Performance
summary: What Electronic Arts stock’s recent move means for investors Electronic Arts (EA) has seen mixed share performance recently, with a modest gain over the past week but negative returns over the past month and past 3 months, prompting investors to reassess what is currently priced in. At the last close of US$201.22, the stock sits close to some analyst fair value estimates. Recent financial data shows annual revenue of US$7.3b and net income of US$680.0m, supported by growth in both revenue and...
